steps.title: Read truly as an intensifier
steps.content: The narrator says Pheus truly shines when performing and then explains that he becomes a heightened version of himself. In context, truly intensifies shines and means genuinely or actually.

steps.title: Reject incompatible meanings
steps.content: Choice A means obediently, which has nothing to do with excelling onstage. Choice B means barely, contradicting the praise. Choice C means rudely, which the passage does not suggest. The remaining word means genuinely or actually. The answer is D.
